album_name: From Lost to Found: The Odyssey

tracks.title: 01: The House of Giants
tracks.lyrics: (Kalobe): The lumber is heavy, the rafters are high. I built this for her, beneath the grey sky. (Kimberly): The world is a shadow, the light is the Word. A truth in the darkness that must be heard. (Chorus): In the House of the Giants, where the ceilings are tall. We’re building a temple... that’s destined to fall.

tracks.title: 02: Stripes of Night
tracks.lyrics: (Danzer): Fourteen years of being a ghost. In the house where the silence hurts the most. (Chorus): The Abyss looked back and it called my name! I’m a Black Tiger now, with the stripes of night! I’m the thing that’s coming for the 'Worldly' light!

tracks.title: 03: The Looking-Glass
tracks.lyrics: (Leinad): Log in to the forest, log in to the box. I’ve found a key that can pick all the locks. (Chorus): Step through the glass, leave the 'Book' on the shelf. In the 3D world, I can design myself!

tracks.title: 04: The False Dawn
tracks.lyrics: (Kimberly): The sky is painted in fire and blood. A rising tide, a coming flood. (Chorus): It’s a False Dawn! A fire in the clouds! The 'Mirror-Pack' is rising, wrapping us in shrouds!

tracks.title: 05: From Wood to Iron
tracks.lyrics: (Kalobe): Shaved the head and took the name. Another cog in the iron frame. (Chorus): The Iron Machine! It doesn't care! It breathes the dust and it eats the air!

tracks.title: 06: The Wind River Forge
tracks.lyrics: (Kalobe): Sagebrush wind and a Wyoming sky. Looking the 'Elder' straight in the eye. (Chorus): In the Wind River Forge, where the sparks fly high! We’re claiming the earth and we’re claiming the sky!

tracks.title: 07: The Yggdrasil Lullaby
tracks.lyrics: (William): The winter was long, and the mountains were cold. A story of struggle that was starting to grow old. (Chorus): Oh, Willow Wren, my World Tree so high. You’re the song in the wind, you’re the gold in the sky.

tracks.title: 08: The Founding
tracks.lyrics: (Full Clan): WE ARE THE MacTÍRE! THE SONS OF THE LAND! (Outro): We are Found. We are MacTíre. We are Home.

tracks.title: 09: We Danced Through the Flames
tracks.lyrics: (Daniel): I thought the fire would take me. (Shae): I thought the dark would finally know my name. (Both): Hand in hand, no need to run. We danced through the flames... and became the dawn.

tracks.title: 10: The Harbor and the Hearth
tracks.lyrics: (Daniel): You are the Harbor! You are the Hearth! The only map I need across this lonely earth! (Outro): The Wolf is Found... and he isn't alone.
